Emotional Health: Why It's as Important as Physical Health

Meditation isn't just good for your body, it's also good for your soul. Studies have found that it can improve your mood and feelings of well-being.

Ways to Manage Stress

If you're feeling under the weather, meditation can be a great way to naturally reduce stress. Studies have shown that mindfulness meditation helps lower the levels of the stress hormone cortisol.

Working out boosts brain health

Potential to increase the density of grey matter in the brain, which is associated with memory, emotions, and speech.

17

TuckedinTarot

TuckedinTarot, based in Texas, is a tarot reader with claircognizance, clairvoyance, and clairaudience abilities. As a tarot reader, their approach to readings is centered on providing reassurance and offering practical applications to resolve issues in various topics.<br><br>Combining these psychic abilities with tarot reading allows TuckedinTarot to offer unique and holistic insights into various aspects of life. Their readings likely provide guidance, reassurance, and practical advice to help individuals navigate challenges, make informed decisions, and find resolutions in different areas of their lives.

ZolamoonArt - Original Artwork on Your Everyday Pieces!

Zoolamoon Art, a captivating presence on Etsy, is dedicated to capturing and celebrating the exquisite charm and romance found within urban culture. Through their art, they skillfully convey the vibrant energy, diverse experiences, and enchanting facets that urban environments possess. Moreover, their creative vision extends to spotlighting the remarkable beauty and grace of melanated excellence. With a profound appreciation for diversity and individuality, Zoolamoon Art beautifully encapsulates the essence of urban life and the elegance of melanated individuals, creating a visual tapestry that resonates with a wide array of admirers.

UnderTheMountainCo

UndertheMountainCoUnder, The Mountain Co truly embodies a world of creativity and passion! Fusing 3D printing and painting miniatures for DnD and Warhammer40K showcases versatility and dedication to crafting immersive experiences.<br><br>Under the mountain, with its metals, blacksmiths, jewels, and dwarves, reflects the heart and soul of your business—two artisans venturing into a realm of imagination and craftsmanship.

Benefits of Jumping Rope: To Lose Weight and More

Jumping rope is an amazing way to burn calories and get your heart rate up. It’s fun, portable, and can be done anywhere.

Swimming - Livestrong

Swimming is a full-body workout that's easy on the joints. Plus, it's a great way to stay cool during those hot summer months.

How to Start Power Walking for Weight Loss

Power walking is a low-impact exercise that's easy on the joints. It's a great way to enjoy the outdoors while getting a good cardio workout.

Smile Curation

18

Douro Valley Small-Group Tour with Wine Tasting, Lunch and Optional Cruise

My husband and I visited Douro Valley during the spring. It was a little over an hour drive from Porto. It was an absolutely breathtaking experience. When you compare it to the famous Napa Valley in California, Douro Valley is huge! The landscape is totally different. Opting for the small group option our guide Joao picked us up directly from the hotel and our group had just 6 guests. One of the highlights of the trip was learning about port wine, a topic I had very little knowledge of prior to my visit. The guides from two different wineries shared fascinating insights into the history and production of this renowned beverage. The cruise along the Douro River was relaxing and the scenery was beautiful. While the trip was long, Douro Valley should unquestionably be on your travel list. If you don't have the time to go to Douro Valley, you can still sample the region's renowned port wine with a tour of the cellars in Vila Nova de Gaia, just across the river from the Ribeira district in Porto

Casario in Porto

&nbsp;restuaRomantic restaurant overlooking the river with great view. The waiter was friendly and attentive. It's a popular resturant so make reservation far in advance if you can. The food was delicious and the 5 course menu was a reasonable 48 euro and wine pairing was 20 something euro. Request window seat but not to sit outisde. The street musicians are quite loud and may not be your taste of music. Allow extra time to find the restsurant as well, you have to walk up some stairs. It was not right on the riverwalk. It was a very nice experience overall.

Mouzinho da Silveira Unique Apartments, by Oporto Collection, Porto, Portugal

We stayed at this apartment hotel. it's in the best location. It is smack in the middle of the historic center of Porto. &nbsp;Very close to Ribeira district and famous Sao Bento station. We got up early and walked to the station and took all the pictures we wanted before the crowds. 😊The apartment was very clean and the bed was comfortable.

See all 18 recs

View List
Portugal Must do Tours and Restaurants- Porto and Lisbon

I visited Portugal in May, and it's a charming place. &nbsp;I'd recommend going in April, May, September, or October for milder weather and fewer crowds. Portugal is budget-friendly; we used Uber everywhere in Porto and Lisbon, which was cheaper than taking taxis. Some taxis only take cash, so be sure to check with the driver before getting in. We took the comfortable train ride from Porto to Lisbon and scored discounts by buying tickets in advance. Inform your bank about your travel plans; I did not do it and could only withdraw cash in Lisbon but not Porto. Many attractions are crowded, so consider tour options to skip the lines if time is important for you. Bring comfortable shoes!! Lots of walking on cobblestone streets and Lisbon is hilly.

View List
European inspired kitchen + dining items to create everyday magic

Everytime I return from spending time in Europe, all I want to do is recreate the magic I experienced there, namely at every meal. There is such emphasis on the art of the meal and how it fosters a communal connection - something that too often gets lost in American life. I put together this list of recommendations for you to be able to create a piece of European magic in your own home - from beautiful Portuguese ceramic pieces to bespoke Italian cutlery and handcrafted wooden bowls fit for any fruit. I hope you feel inspired and enlivened to create a special connection with those you love - over the dinner table and across oceans. Let me know if you have any questions and don't hesitate to comment with any questions or feedback. Always delighted to help!

Bentonville Community Center | Bentonville, AR

The Bentonville Community Center is a wonderful facility and a great value! Not only do you have full access to the gym and wonderful pool and aquatic center, there are a wide array of classes, from fitness to educational, that you can take.

Northwest Arkansas Pediatrics - Medical Associates of Northwest Arkansas

NWA Pediatrics is the best! With pediatric clinics in both Rogers and Fayetteville, appointment and walk-in options, 24/7 nurse care line, and an incredible, caring staff, I've trusted NWA Peds with my kiddos' care since day one.

Great and knowledgeable source for stringed instruments in downtown Rogers
